title: Venn (disambiguation)
content:
'''Venn''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Venn (Solar Array 22-X)|Venn]]''', a crewmember of [[Solar Array 22-X]]
*'''[[Venn (cadet)|Venn]]''', an [[Imperial cadet]]
*'''[[Venn's commander]]''', the [[Commanding officer|officer]] of Venn and multiple other [[cadet]]s

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Lillia Venn]]''', a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]]
*'''[[Marlena Venn]]''', a [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*'''[[Tanis Venn]]''', a [[Desert hulak wraid|wraid]] hunter and Marlena's husband
*'''[[Corix Venne]]''', a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] musician
*'''[[Venn-bug]]''', an insect

{{Disambig}}
